action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 14 completed training with additive residual approach (5 ensemble members, val Spearman 0.8642). Previous best test Spearman was 0.7432 (without additive approach). The augmentation attempt was catastrophic (-0.337). The additive residual approach should help extrapolation because the additive model from single-mutant effects generalizes naturally to multi-mutation sequences, while the neural network only learns epistatic corrections. Analysis: Must submit eval immediately to see if additive residual improves test Spearman. This is the key hypothesis - additive baseline + residual learning should extrapolate much better to >2 mutation sequences. Decision: Submit eval now, then analyze results to determine next steps.
